steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The assertion states that the plant with the highest average power generated per year in 2019 was located on a specific body of water. The answer requires reading the "Average power generation (MWh)" column in the table and identifying which plant produced the most.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Androscoggin River.: the plant on the Androscoggin River generated 14,126 MWh — the lowest figure in the table. ✗
  • Choice B — Hiwassee River.: Hiwassee Dam generated 196,220 MWh — by far the highest value in the table. ✓
  • Choice C — Spearfish Creek.: the plant on Spearfish Creek generated 2,204 MWh — well below Hiwassee Dam. ✗
  • Choice D — Montreal River.: the plant on the Montreal River generated 10,693 MWh — also lower than Hiwassee Dam. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
